title: The Snake Temple (Oric) by RAX by BASIC 10Liner
content_text: 10 Line BASIC ============= Category : PUR-80 TITLE : The Snake Temple PLATFORM : Oric Atmos LANGUAGE : BASIC 1.1b AUTHOR : RAX Code: ---------1---------2---------3---------4---------5---------6---------7-------- 0D$="$$$b$$$b$$$b,bGb#%###3###+7+7Ea?#1>aS1$a#Ab#Vbb##/#AP/5V":A=#B507:INK6''' 1FORI=1TOLEN(D$):K=ASC(MID$(D$,I,1))-35:POKEA+I,K:NEXT:DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X) 2DIMD(999):O=37:B=161:FORI=0TO36:D(I)=B:D(I+888)=B+1:T=INT(I*.65)*O:D(T)=B'''' 3D(T+36)=B:NEXT:PAPER0:H=8:FORY=2TO23STEP2:FORX=2TO34STEP2:D(X+Y*O)=B:R=FNR(5) 4D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3):D(X+Y*O+D)=B:NEXTX,Y:FORI=0TO924:T=D(I):?".";'' 5IFT=BANDD(I+O)=0THENT=162ELSEIFT=0THENT=FNR(3)+35ELSE:D(I)=T:NEXT:Y=FNR(22)+2 6D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38:X=FNR(35)+2:CLS:REPEAT:GETK$:Q=X:W=Y:K=ASC(K$)''' 7Y=Y+(K=11)-(K=10):X=X+(K=8)-(K=9):IFD(X+Y*O)>99THENX=Q:Y=WELSE:B=X+Y*O:Z=D(B) 8H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(3)+2)*(Z=O):FORG=-1TO1:FORL=-1TO1:PLOT2+X+L,Y+G,D(B+L+G*O)' 9NEXTL,G:D(B)=35:PLOTX+2,Y,39:?@2,25;"HP:"H:UNTILZ=38ORH<1:ZAP:IFH>0THEN?"WIN" RUN STORY: You are a young hero named Bocco who has set out in search of treasure in the Temple of the Snakes. Among the labyrinth of tunnels is a treasure chest that you must find. The temple is full of snakes so be careful!. A snake inflicts damage on 1 to 4 health points. Each flask you find restores 2 health points. Use the arrow keys to control Bocco. Have fun :) CODE EXPLANATION: ---------------------------------------- 0D$="$$$b$$$b$$$b,bGb#%###3###+7+7Ea?#1>aS1$a#Ab#Vbb##/#AP/5V":A=#B507:INK6''' D$="$$$b$$$b$$$b,bGb#%###3###+7+7Ea?#1>aS1$a#Ab#Vbb##/#AP/5V" - characters data A=#B507 - the start address of characters to be modified INK6 - set chars color cyan ---------------------------------------- 1FORI=1TOLEN(D$):K=ASC(MID$(D$,I,1))-35:POKEA+I,K:NEXT:DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X) FORI=1TOLEN(D$) - change characters K=ASC(MID$(D$,I,1))-35 - gat data from D$ POKEA+I,K - change line of character NEXT DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X) - define custon function R to generate random number ---------------------------------------- 2DIMD(999):O=37:B=161:FORI=0TO36:D(I)=B:D(I+888)=B+1:T=INT(I*.65)*O:D(T)=B'''' DIMD(999) - maze array O=37 - maze width B=161 - brick character (33) with set bit 7 for invers colors FORI=0TO36 - create maze borders D(I)=B - set top border D(I+888)=B+1 - set bottom border T=INT(I*.65)*O - calc left vertical border D(T)=B - set left border ---------------------------------------- 3D(T+36)=B:NEXT:PAPER0:H=8:FORY=2TO23STEP2:FORX=2TO34STEP2:D(X+Y*O)=B:R=FNR(5) D(T+36)=B - set right border NEXT PAPER0 - set background color to black H=8 FORY=2TO23STEP2 - generate maze FORX=2TO34STEP2 D(X+Y*O)=B - set brick R=FNR(5) - get random number bettwen 0-4 ---------------------------------------- 4D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3):D(X+Y*O+D)=B:NEXTX,Y:FORI=0TO924:T=D(I):?".";'' D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3) - get direction to set next random brick D(X+Y*O+D)=B - set random brick NEXTX,Y FORI=0TO924 - replaces the standard brick in the maze with another one for a more fancy look :), and set flask and snakes T=D(I) - get currnet char in position ?"." - print "." into the screen to see some processing is performed ---------------------------------------- 5IFT=BANDD(I+O)=0THENT=162ELSEIFT=0THENT=FNR(3)+35ELSE:D(I)=T:NEXT:Y=FNR(22)+2 IF T=B AND D(I+O)=0 THEN - if there is a brick in the current position and there is an empty space under it, then T=162 - set new brick in T ELSE IF T=0 THEN - if is only empty block then T=FNR(3)+35 - set in T random char bettwen (35-37) (ground, flask, snake) ELSE : - nothing D(I)=T - set the modified value in the maze NEXT Y=FNR(22)+2 - get random Y position for player ---------------------------------------- 6D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38:X=FNR(35)+2:CLS:REPEAT:GETK$:Q=X:W=Y:K=ASC(K$)''' D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38 - set chest into a maze (char 38) X=FNR(35)+2 - get random X position for player CLS - clear screen REPEAT - game loop GET K$ - get key into k$ Q=X - old X position W=Y - old Y position K=ASC(K$) - get ascii number for pressed key ---------------------------------------- 7Y=Y+(K=11)-(K=10):X=X+(K=8)-(K=9):IFD(X+Y*O)>99THENX=Q:Y=WELSE:B=X+Y*O:Z=D(B) Y=Y+(K=11)-(K=10) - calc new Y position X=X+(K=8)-(K=9) - calc new X position IFD(X+Y*O)>99 THEN - if there is a brick in the new position then X=Q - return the old position into X Y=W - return the old position into Y ELSE : - nothing B=X+Y*O - calc new player position into maze array Z=D(B) - takes the chars that is in the current player position ---------------------------------------- 8H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(4)+1)*(Z=O):FORG=-1TO1:FORL=-1TO1:PLOT2+X+L,Y+G,D(B+L+G*O)' H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(4)+1)*(Z=O) - calc player health whit char in playr position ( if it is a flack then add 2 or if a snake then reduced health by 1 to 4 ) FORG=-1TO1 - print player area loop 3х3 FORL=-1TO1 PLOT2+X+L,Y+G,D(B+L+G*O) - print current maze char ---------------------------------------- 9NEXTL,G:D(B)=35:PLOTX+2,Y,39:?@2,25;"HP:"H:UNTILZ=38ORH<1:ZAP:IFH>0THEN?"WIN" NEXTL,G D(B)=35 - set ground charate into maze (removes snakes and flasks when the player passes them ) PLOTX+2,Y,39 - print player ?@2,25;"HP:"H - print player health on the screen UNTIL Z=38 OR H<1 - do game loop while Z=38 (take chest) or H<1 (the player has no health) ZAP - little sound effect IF H>0 THEN - if the player is healthy then ?"WIN" - print "WIN"

blocks.html_en: You are a young hero named Bocco who has set out in search of treasure in the Temple of the Snakes.

sentences.en: You are a young hero named Bocco who has set out in search of treasure in the Temple of the Snakes.
sentences.zh: 你是一位名叫博科的年轻英雄，他出发前往蛇神庙寻找宝藏。

blocks.html_en: Among the labyrinth of tunnels is a treasure chest that you must find. The temple is full of snakes

sentences.en: Among the labyrinth of tunnels is a treasure chest that you must find.
sentences.zh: 在迷宫般的隧道中有一个你必须找到的宝箱。

sentences.en: The temple is full of snakes

blocks.html_en: so be careful!. A snake inflicts damage on 1 to 4 health points. Each flask you find restores 2 health points.

sentences.en: A snake inflicts damage on 1 to 4 health points.
sentences.zh: 蛇会对 1 到 4 点生命值造成伤害。

sentences.en: Each flask you find restores 2 health points.
sentences.zh: 您找到的每个烧瓶都会恢复 2 点生命值。

blocks.html_en: Use the arrow keys to control Bocco. Have fun :)

sentences.en: Use the arrow keys to control Bocco.

blocks.html_en: A=#B507 - the start address of characters to be modified

sentences.en: A=#B507 - the start address of characters to be modified
sentences.zh: A=#B507——要修改的字符的起始地址
INK6 - 设置字符颜色青色
K=ASC(MID$(D$,I,1))-35 - 来自 D$ 的 gat 数据

blocks.html_en: DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X)     - define custon function R to generate random number

sentences.en: DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X) - define custon function R to generate random number
sentences.zh: DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X) - 定义自定义函数R来生成随机数

sentences.en: B=161 - brick character (33) with set bit 7 for invers colors
sentences.zh: B=161 - 砖块字符 (33)，设置位 7 用于反转颜色

sentences.en: PAPER0 - set background color to black
sentences.zh: PAPER0 - 将背景颜色设置为黑色
R=FNR(5) - 获取 0-4 之间的随机数

sentences.en: D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3) - get direction to set next random brick
sentences.zh: D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3) - 获取设置下一个随机砖块的方向

blocks.html_en: FORI=0TO924                             - replaces the standard brick in the maze with another one for a more fancy look :), and set flask and snakes

sentences.en: FORI=0TO924 - replaces the standard brick in the maze with another one for a more fancy look :), and set flask and snakes
sentences.zh: FORI=0TO924 - 用另一块砖替换迷宫中的标准砖，以获得更奇特的外观:)，并设置烧瓶和蛇

sentences.en: T=D(I) - get currnet char in position
into the screen to see some processing is performed
sentences.zh: 进入屏幕以查看执行的一些处理

blocks.html_en: IF T=B AND D(I+O)=0 THEN            - if there is a brick in the current position and there is an empty space under it, then

sentences.en: IF T=B AND D(I+O)=0 THEN - if there is a brick in the current position and there is an empty space under it, then
sentences.zh: IF T=B AND D(I+O)=0 THEN - 如果当前位置有一块砖块并且其下方有一个空白空间，则

sentences.en: T=162 - set new brick in T
sentences.zh: T=162 - 在 T 中设置新砖

sentences.en: IF T=0 THEN - if is only empty block then
sentences.zh: IF T=0 THEN - 如果只是空块 then

sentences.en: T=FNR(3)+35 - set in T random char bettwen (35-37) (ground, flask, snake)
sentences.zh: T=FNR(3)+35 - 设置为 T random char betwen (35-37)（地面、烧瓶、蛇）

sentences.en: D(I)=T - set the modified value in the maze
sentences.zh: D(I)=T - 设置迷宫中的修改值

sentences.en: Y=FNR(22)+2 - get random Y position for player
sentences.zh: Y=FNR(22)+2 - 获取玩家的随机 Y 位置

sentences.en: D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38 - set chest into a maze (char 38)
sentences.zh: D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38 - 将箱子放入迷宫（字符 38）

sentences.en: X=FNR(35)+2 - get random X position for player
sentences.zh: X=FNR(35)+2 - 获取玩家的随机 X 位置

sentences.en: GET K$ - get key into k$
sentences.zh: GET K$ - 获取 k$ 的密钥
Q=X - 旧的 X 位置

sentences.en: K=ASC(K$) - get ascii number for pressed key
sentences.zh: K=ASC(K$) - 获取按键的 ASCII 码
Y=Y+(K=11)-(K=10) - 计算新的 Y 位置
X=X+(K=8)-(K=9) - 计算新的 X 位置

sentences.en: IFD(X+Y*O)>99 THEN - if there is a brick in the new position then
sentences.zh: IFD(X+Y*O)>99 THEN - 如果新位置有砖块，则

sentences.en: X=Q - return the old position into X
sentences.zh: X=Q - 将旧位置返回到 X

sentences.en: Y=W - return the old position into Y
sentences.zh: Y=W - 将旧位置返回到 Y

sentences.en: B=X+Y*O - calc new player position into maze array
sentences.zh: B=X+Y*O - 将新玩家位置计算到迷宫数组中

sentences.en: Z=D(B) - takes the chars that is in the current player position
sentences.zh: Z=D(B) - 获取当前玩家位置的字符

sentences.en: H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(4)+1)*(Z=O) - calc player health whit char in playr position
sentences.zh: H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(4)+1)*(Z=O) - 计算玩家位置上的玩家生命值

sentences.en: ( if it is a flack then add 2 or if a snake then reduced health by 1 to 4 )
sentences.zh: （如果是攻击则增加 2 点，如果是蛇则生命值减少 1 到 4 点）
FORG=-1TO1 - 打印玩家区域循环 3х3
PLOT2+X+L,Y+G,D(B+L+G*O) - 打印当前迷宫字符

sentences.en: D(B)=35 - set ground charate into maze (removes snakes and flasks when the player passes them )
sentences.zh: D(B)=35 - 将地面字符放入迷宫（当玩家经过时移除蛇和烧瓶）

sentences.en: ?@2,25;"HP:"H - print player health on the screen
sentences.zh: ?@2,25;"HP:"H - 在屏幕上打印玩家的健康状况

sentences.en: UNTIL Z=38 OR H<1 - do game loop while Z=38 (take chest) or H<1 (the player has no health)
sentences.zh: UNTIL Z=38 OR H<1 - 当 Z=38（获取宝箱）或 H<1（玩家没有生命值）时进行游戏循环

sentences.en: IF H>0 THEN - if the player is healthy then
sentences.zh: IF H>0 THEN - 如果球员健康则

content_html_zh:
10 行基本

=============

类别 : PUR-80

作品名称：蛇庙

平台：任何 Atmos

语言：基础 1.1b

作者：RAX

Code:

---------1---------2---------3---------4---------5---------6---------7--------
0D$="$$$b$$$b$$$b,bGb#%###3###+7+7Ea?#1>aS1$a#Ab#Vbb##/#AP/5V":A=#B507:INK6'''
1FORI=1TOLEN(D$):K=ASC(MID$(D$,I,1))-35:POKEA+I,K:NEXT:DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X)
2DIMD(999):O=37:B=161:FORI=0TO36:D(I)=B:D(I+888)=B+1:T=INT(I*.65)*O:D(T)=B''''
3D(T+36)=B:NEXT:PAPER0:H=8:FORY=2TO23STEP2:FORX=2TO34STEP2:D(X+Y*O)=B:R=FNR(5)
4D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3):D(X+Y*O+D)=B:NEXTX,Y:FORI=0TO924:T=D(I):?".";''
5IFT=BANDD(I+O)=0THENT=162ELSEIFT=0THENT=FNR(3)+35ELSE:D(I)=T:NEXT:Y=FNR(22)+2
6D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38:X=FNR(35)+2:CLS:REPEAT:GETK$:Q=X:W=Y:K=ASC(K$)'''
7Y=Y+(K=11)-(K=10):X=X+(K=8)-(K=9):IFD(X+Y*O)>99THENX=Q:Y=WELSE:B=X+Y*O:Z=D(B)
8H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(3)+2)*(Z=O):FORG=-1TO1:FORL=-1TO1:PLOT2+X+L,Y+G,D(B+L+G*O)'
9NEXTL,G:D(B)=35:PLOTX+2,Y,39:?@2,25;"HP:"H:UNTILZ=38ORH<1:ZAP:IFH>0THEN?"WIN"

RUN

STORY:

你是一位名叫博科的年轻英雄，他出发前往蛇神庙寻找宝藏。

在迷宫般的隧道中有一个你必须找到的宝箱。 寺庙里爬满了蛇

所以要小心！ 蛇会对 1 到 4 点生命值造成伤害。 您找到的每个烧瓶都会恢复 2 点生命值。

使用箭头键控制 Bocco。 玩得开心 ：）

代码说明：

----------------------------------------

0D$="$$$b$$$b$$$b,bGb#%###3###+7+7Ea?#1>aS1$a#Ab#Vbb##/#AP/5V":A=#B507:INK6'''

D$="$$$b$$$b$$$b,bGb#%###3###+7+7Ea?#1>aS1$a#Ab#Vbb##/#AP/5V" - 字符数据

A=#B507——要修改的字符的起始地址

INK6 - 设置字符颜色青色

----------------------------------------

1FORI=1TOLEN(D$):K=ASC(MID$(D$,I,1))-35:POKEA+I,K:NEXT:DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X)

FORI=1TOLEN(D$) - 更改字符

K=ASC(MID$(D$,I,1))-35 - 来自 D$ 的 gat 数据

POKEA+I,K - 更改字符行

    NEXT

DEFFNR(X)=INT(RND(1)*X) - 定义自定义函数R来生成随机数

----------------------------------------

2DIMD(999):O=37:B=161:FORI=0TO36:D(I)=B:D(I+888)=B+1:T=INT(I*.65)*O:D(T)=B''''

DIMD(999) - 迷宫数组

O=37 - 迷宫宽度

B=161 - 砖块字符 (33)，设置位 7 用于反转颜色

FORI=0TO36 - 创建迷宫边界

D(I)=B - 设置顶部边框

D(I+888)=B+1 - 设置底部边框

T=INT(I*.65)*O - 计算左垂直边框

D(T)=B - 设置左边框

----------------------------------------

3D(T+36)=B:下一个:PAPER0:H=8:FORY=2TO23STEP2:FORX=2TO34STEP2:D(X+Y*O)=B:R=FNR(5)

D(T+36)=B - 设置右边框

    NEXT

PAPER0 - 将背景颜色设置为黑色

    H=8

FORY=2TO23STEP2 - 生成迷宫

FORX=2TO34STEP2

D(X+Y*O)=B - 积木

R=FNR(5) - 获取 0-4 之间的随机数

----------------------------------------

4D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3):D(X+Y*O+D)=B:NEXTX,Y:FORI=0TO924:T=D(I):?".";''

D=(R=0)-(R=1)+O*(R=2)-O*(R=3) - 获取设置下一个随机砖块的方向

D(X+Y*O+D)=B - 设置随机砖块

下一个，Y

FORI=0TO924 - 用另一块砖替换迷宫中的标准砖，以获得更奇特的外观:)，并设置烧瓶和蛇

T=D(I) - 使当前字符就位

？”。” - 打印 ”。” 进入屏幕以查看执行的一些处理

----------------------------------------

5IFT=BANDD(I+O)=0THENT=162ELSEIFT=0THENT=FNR(3)+35ELSE:D(I)=T:NEXT:Y=FNR(22)+2

IF T=B AND D(I+O)=0 THEN - 如果当前位置有一块砖块并且其下方有一个空白空间，则

T=162 - 在 T 中设置新砖

        ELSE

IF T=0 THEN - 如果只是空块 then

T=FNR(3)+35 - 设置为 T random char betwen (35-37)（地面、烧瓶、蛇）

            ELSE

： - 没有什么

D(I)=T - 设置迷宫中的修改值

    NEXT

Y=FNR(22)+2 - 获取玩家的随机 Y 位置

----------------------------------------

6D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38:X=FNR(35)+2:CLS:重复:GETK$:Q=X:W=Y:K=ASC(K$)'''

D(O+1+FNR(35)+FNR(20)*O)=38 - 将箱子放入迷宫（字符 38）

X=FNR(35)+2 - 获取玩家的随机 X 位置

CLS-- 清晰的屏幕

REPEAT - 游戏循环

GET K$ - 获取 k$ 的密钥

Q=X - 旧的 X 位置

W=Y - 旧 Y 位置

K=ASC(K$) - 获取按键的 ASCII 码

----------------------------------------

7Y=Y+(K=11)-(K=10):X=X+(K=8)-(K=9):IFD(X+Y*O)>99THENX=Q:Y=鲶鱼:B=X+Y*O:Z=D(B)

Y=Y+(K=11)-(K=10) - 计算新的 Y 位置

X=X+(K=8)-(K=9) - 计算新的 X 位置

IFD(X+Y*O)>99 THEN - 如果新位置有砖块，则

X=Q - 将旧位置返回到 X

Y=W - 将旧位置返回到 Y

        ELSE

： - 没有什么

B=X+Y*O - 将新玩家位置计算到迷宫数组中

Z=D(B) - 获取当前玩家位置的字符

----------------------------------------

8H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(4)+1)*(Z=O):FORG=-1TO1:FORL=-1TO1:PLOT2+X+L,Y+G,D(B+L+G*O)'

H=H-2*(Z=36)+(FNR(4)+1)*(Z=O) - 计算玩家位置上的玩家生命值

（如果是攻击则增加 2 点，如果是蛇则生命值减少 1 到 4 点）

FORG=-1TO1 - 打印玩家区域循环 3х3

FORL=-1TO1

PLOT2+X+L,Y+G,D(B+L+G*O) - 打印当前迷宫字符

----------------------------------------

9NEXTL,G:D(B)=35:PLOTX+2,Y,39:?@2,25;"HP:"H:UNTILZ=38ORH<1:ZAP:IFH>0THEN?"获胜"

下一个，G

D(B)=35 - 将地面字符放入迷宫（当玩家经过时移除蛇和烧瓶）

PLOTX+2,Y,39 - 打印播放器

?@2,25;"HP:"H - 在屏幕上打印玩家的健康状况

UNTIL Z=38 OR H<1 - 当 Z=38（获取宝箱）或 H<1（玩家没有生命值）时进行游戏循环

ZAP-- 小声音效果

IF H>0 THEN - 如果球员健康则

?“WIN”-打印“WIN”
